tasks.name: Create presentation data fetcher function
tasks.purpose: Add server-side function to fetch user presentations from building_blocks_submissions table with RLS protection

dependencies: cache from react for per-request caching
constraints: Use RLS-protected Supabase client
Order by updated_at desc to show most recent first
Limit to 50 records maximum for initial load
Select only columns needed: id, title, presentation_type, updated_at

tasks.input_state: No presentation data fetcher exists for dashboard
tasks.output_state: loadUserPresentations function exists and exports typed PresentationRow array
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function exists in _lib/server/ and returns array of presentation rows with correct typing

tasks.name: Create presentation table widget component
tasks.purpose: Build client component using DataTable to display presentations with columns for title, type, updated date, and actions

dependencies: Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow from @kit/ui/shadcn
constraints: Use 'use client' directive for client-side interactivity
Define column definitions for title, presentation_type, updated_at, actions
Enable sorting on all columns except actions
Set default sorting by updated_at desc
Use pageSize of 15 with manualPagination enabled
Import PresentationRow type from load-presentations.ts

tasks.output_state: PresentationTableWidget component exists with column definitions and DataTable integration
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component exists with DataTable configured and column definitions for title, type, updated_at, actions

tasks.name: Create table skeleton loading component
tasks.purpose: Build skeleton rows component to show loading state while presentations are fetching

constraints: Render 5-10 skeleton rows matching table structure
Use Skeleton component with matching height/width to actual table cells
Show skeleton when isLoading prop is true

tasks.input_state: No loading skeleton exists for presentation table
tasks.output_state: TableSkeleton component exists with configurable row count and skeleton cells matching table columns
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component exists and renders skeleton rows matching table structure

tasks.name: Add empty state for presentation table
tasks.purpose: Configure EmptyState component to display when user has no presentations with CTA to create first

constraints: Show EmptyState when presentations array is empty
Display heading: 'No Presentations Yet'
Display text: 'Create your first presentation outline to get started'
CTA button: 'Create First Presentation' linking to /home/(user)/ai/blocks
Use Trans component for internationalization

tasks.input_state: No empty state configuration in presentation table widget
tasks.output_state: EmptyState configured in PresentationTableWidget with heading, text, and CTA button
tasks.acceptance_criterion: EmptyState renders when presentations array is empty with correct heading, text, and CTA button
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'EmptyState' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/presentation-table-widget.tsx && grep -q 'Create First Presentation\|No Presentations Yet' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/presentation-table-widget.tsx

tasks.name: Render Edit Outline button in table actions column

action.target: Edit Outline button in table actions column

tasks.purpose: Add visual button element to actions column that will navigate to storyboard page

constraints: Render button in actions column cell
Display 'Edit Outline' text with Edit icon
Use variant='outline' or variant='ghost' for subtle appearance
Pass submission_id as data attribute for wiring
Do NOT add onClick handler yet (handled in T6)

tasks.input_state: Actions column exists without button element
tasks.output_state: Actions column displays Edit Outline button with icon
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Button element exists in actions column with text 'Edit Outline' and Edit icon

tasks.name: Wire Edit Outline button to storyboard navigation

action.target: Edit Outline button to storyboard navigation

tasks.purpose: Add onClick handler to Edit Outline button that navigates to storyboard page with submission_id query parameter

constraints: Add onClick handler to Edit Outline button
Navigate to /home/(user)/ai/storyboard route
Include submission_id as query parameter: ?id={submission.id}
Handle navigation client-side with router.push()

tasks.input_state: Edit Outline button rendered without navigation handler
tasks.output_state: Edit Outline button navigates to storyboard page with correct submission_id
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Clicking Edit Outline button navigates to /home/(user)/ai/storyboard?id=<submission_id>

tasks.name: Integrate presentation table widget into dashboard page

action.target: presentation table widget into dashboard page

tasks.purpose: Add PresentationTableWidget to user dashboard page in bottom row of grid layout

constraints: Import PresentationTableWidget component
Fetch presentations in server component using loadUserPresentations
Pass presentations array to PresentationTableWidget
Wrap widget in Suspense with TableSkeleton as fallback
Place widget in bottom row of dashboard grid (full-width col-span)
Handle data fetching error gracefully

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page exists without presentation table widget
tasks.output_state: PresentationTableWidget integrated into dashboard page with data fetching and error handling
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Dashboard page renders PresentationTableWidget with presentation data and skeleton loading state
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'PresentationTableWidget' apps/web/app/home/(user)/page.tsx && grep -q 'loadUserPresentations' apps/web/app/home/(user)/page.tsx && grep -q 'Suspense' apps/web/app/home/(user)/page.tsx
